package rulecoverage

func PositiveStringsNewreplacerPerCall() string {
    ruleID := "strings_newreplacer_per_call"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`strings.NewReplacer(...)` recreated on request or loop paths."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
